question: Small contradiction between you and the book. You told us recently that your mother was stung by the scorpion on the rooftop where you slept in summer. The existing draft has her saying she was stung in her own bathroom, putting her hand on the wall as she came out. Which one is right? Where was your mother actually stung — the rooftop, the bathroom, somewhere else?
answer: no she was not in the bathroom she was sleeping in her bed on the top of the roof, usually
